title: Sesame Pilaf with Ukrainian Twist
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish with a hint of Ukrainian spices, topped with toasted sesame seeds.

ingredients.name: light vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: chicken broth can be used as alternative

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add Ukrainian spices mix and sauté for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add light vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Add xtra long grain rice and stir to coat rice with oil and spices.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed.
Fluff pilaf with a fork, if using.
Transfer pilaf to a serving platter and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds.
